title: Warm up
content: The slide showcases three different cities: Beijing, Chongqing, and Hangzhou, with visual depictions illustrating driving scenarios and cityscapes. The images suggest varying transportation experiences and urban landscapes.

title: An Evolving Nation
content: The slide presents the concept of 'A Ride Through China' as a metaphor for exploring the nation's changes. It features images related to transportation and iconic city landmarks.

title: Session 1 Match the City Chain!
content: This session focuses on investigating local features, development strategies, and their outcomes in city development. The process involves identifying local characteristics, forming strategies, and achieving positive impacts.

title: Match the city to its development strategy
content: The slide aligns specific cities with their development strategies. Beijing focuses on technology and tradition integration, Chongqing prioritizes sustainable urban development, and Hangzhou emphasizes tourism and economic growth.

title: Through the eyes of taxi drivers…
content: The slide explains how taxi drivers perceive urban development through strategies tailored to each city. It reinforces the evolving nature of China and the importance of localized strategies for city growth.
